phrases.intent_en: Where do I validate before boarding to Prague
phrases.text_local: Kde si mám označit jízdenku před odjezdem do Prahy?
phrases.cultural_note: Validation machines are on the platform, not in the station building, to prevent boarding without a validated ticket.

likely_response.translation_en: The yellow machine down on the platform.

responses.english: The yellow machine down on the platform.

phrases.intent_en: Do I need a separate PID zone ticket
phrases.text_local: Potřebuju zvláštní jízdenku pro PID pásmo?
phrases.cultural_note: Conductors check both national and PID zone tickets. Not having one results in a fine on the spot.

likely_response.local: Ano, musíte mít platnou PID jízdenku.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, you must have a valid PID ticket.

responses.english: Yes, you must have a valid PID ticket.
responses.french: Ano, musíte mít platnou PID jízdenku.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the underpass to town center
phrases.cultural_note: Small stations often have a single underpass connecting platforms, leading directly to the town-side exit.

likely_response.translation_en: Straight ahead and then immediately left.

responses.english: Straight ahead and then immediately left.

phrases.intent_en: When does the next train to main station leave
phrases.text_local: Kdy jede další vlak na hlavní nádraží?
phrases.cultural_note: Dispatchers often give the platform number along with the time, as small stations have only a few tracks.

likely_response.local: Za osm minut z druhé koleje.
likely_response.translation_en: In eight minutes from platform two.

responses.english: In eight minutes from platform two.
responses.french: Za osm minut z druhé koleje.
